sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n73910" key="o(mo/xoros" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">ὁμό-χορος</orth>, <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">ον</itype>, <sense id="n73910.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">belonging to the same chorus,</tr_> <foreign lang="greek" TEIform="foreign">τοῦ θεοῦ</foreign> ib. <bibl default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">768b</biblScope></bibl>.</sense> </entryFree>
